text: The Artist table typically contains 275 unique artist records in the standard Chinook dataset.
The Album table typically contains 347 unique album records linked to various artists.
The Track table contains approximately 3,503 records representing individual songs and videos.
The Customer table contains 59 unique customers from various countries around the world.
The Invoice table contains 412 total invoices representing historical sales data.
The InvoiceLine table contains 2,240 records detailing every item sold in every invoice.
The Employee table contains 8 records, representing the entire staff of the digital store.
The Artist 'Iron Maiden' has the highest number of albums in the database with 21 entries.
The Artist 'Led Zeppelin' follows closely with 14 albums in the Album table.
